description: Anti-Design tokens — intentional rule-breaking. Misaligned layouts, mismatched fonts (3-4), clashing saturated colors, visible 'mistakes' as features. Punk/zine/web 1.0 aesthetic.
philosophy: Every broken rule must be INTENTIONAL. Document why each rule was broken. Accidental bad design is just bad design.

layout.spacing: inconsistent on purpose — some elements touch edges, others float

typography._rule: MIX 3-4 different font families on one page. No consistency.

fonts.system: 'Times New Roman', 'Comic Sans MS' (allowed, even celebrated)

typography.hierarchy: INVERTED — body text large (28px+), headlines small (18px). Or extreme sizes.
typography.letterSpacing: extreme values (-5px or 20px) for weird effects

color.strategy: intentional clashing — curated tension, not random

visibleMistakes.defaultBrowserStyles: blue links, underlines, Times New Roman — keep them visible
visibleMistakes.web1Callbacks: marquee text, blink, hit counters, 'under construction' GIFs
